name: MultiLayer Perceptron
description: The Multilayer Perceptron node enables training of fully connected neural networks for classification tasks using feedforward artificial neural networks.

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing numerical input features used by the neural network for learning patterns.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the class or category that the neural network is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the output column where predicted class labels are written after model execution.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls how the dataset is divided between training and validation to assess model performance.

fields.name: layers
fields.title: Layers - comma separated list of integers
fields.description: Defines the neural network architecture by specifying the number of neurons in each layer, including input, hidden, and output layers.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Max number of iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of training iterations used to optimize the neural network weights.

fields.name: blockSize
fields.title: Block Size
fields.description: Number of records processed together in each training block to improve computational efficiency.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to initialize the neural network and ensure reproducible training results.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tol
fields.description: Convergence tolerance used to determine when training should stop based on minimal improvement.

fields.name: solver
fields.title: Solver
fields.description: Optimization algorithm used to train the neural network weights.

fields.name: stepSize
fields.title: Step Size
fields.description: Learning rate that controls how much model weights are updated during each iteration.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enables visualization of prediction accuracy across different classes.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the confusion matrix visualization.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Business-friendly explanation describing how predicted results compare with actual outcomes.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label representing the number of records for each outcome.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Business interpretation of correct predictions, errors, and misclassifications.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enables ROC curve visualization to evaluate classification performance.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed on the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Explanation of how well the model distinguishes between different classes.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis representing the false positive rate.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis representing the true positive rate.
